title: LLM Minesweeper Benchmark
desc: Can Gemini 2.0 Flash play Minesweeper on a real Android device via ADB and uiautomator2? Step-by-step game replays with findings on vision-driven mobile automation.

title: LLM Chess Evaluation Harness
desc: A sophisticated evaluation framework for testing the chess-playing capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) against Stockfish. Uses MCP server and TUI dashboard.

title: Environmental Change Insights
desc: A curated collection of major ecological disruptions and urban terraforming events detected across our study regions using OlmoEarth satellite data.

title: Circuit Lab - LLM × Wokwi
desc: A purely-browser playground that lets any OpenAI-compatible LLM generate complete Wokwi simulation projects from natural-language prompts, and runs them live in an embedded Wokwi simulator.

title: ASR Transcription Benchmark
desc: Multi-model Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) benchmarking suite testing OpenAI Whisper Realtime, Gemma, and Gemini models across clean baseline, noise, multi-speaker, and accent variations.

title: Python Libraries Analysis
desc: Static code quality audit of the most-downloaded PyPI libraries. Analyzes severity mapping using ty (Astral) and visualizes results via interactive error-density treemaps.

title: Linux Foundation Leaderboards Analysis
desc: An independent analysis of LFX Insights Leaderboards evaluating team efficiency, burnout risk, sustainability, and bus factors across the Linux Foundation open source ecosystem.

title: Gemma Token Stochasticity Analysis
desc: Explores the internal stochastic generation processes of Gemma models by extracting transition scores and logits, featuring D3.js visualizers for guided token generation and branching decision trees.

title: AI-Powered Textbook Fact-Checking
desc: An agentic fact-checking system designed to verify textbooks and technical documentation. Utilizes multi-agent extraction, deep web search, and structured verification reports.
